design_philosophy: A 'Control Room' for AI recruiting. Dense, functional, scanning-optimized. Uses 'couleur AI intelligent' with deep obsidian blacks, crisp pure whites, and electric true blue accents. Avoids generic purple/teal. High contrast signals authority and precision.

layout_and_spacing.grid_system: Control Room Grid (Dense, gap-4 to gap-6). Left sidebar (w-64) + main content area. Strict grid hierarchy for dashboard widgets.
layout_and_spacing.container_padding: Generous internal padding for cards (p-6 or p-8) to prevent text collision with borders.
layout_and_spacing.surface_treatment: Flat solid surfaces. 1px solid border (#ffffff14). No heavy shadows by default, use shadow-lg only on hover or active states. Avoid Glassmorphism on data-heavy tables, use it only for sticky headers.

components_instructions.sidebar: Fixed on the left. Darkest background (#050505). Clear active states for nav items (bg-white/10).
components_instructions.top_header: Sticky with backdrop-blur-xl and bg-background/80. 1px bottom border. Contains breadcrumbs and global 'Generate Message' quick action.
components_instructions.leads_table: Use Shadcn Table. Dense padding. Columns: Lead (Avatar + Name), Platform (Icon), Status (Badge), Domain, AI Score (Visual bar/circle), Actions. Hover rows to slightly lighten background.
components_instructions.ai_score_badge: Render as a combination of a small progress ring and text. Color maps to score thresholds: Green (>80), Amber (50-79), Red (<50).
components_instructions.status_badge: Rounded-full px-2 py-1 text-xs font-medium. Use subtle background tints (e.g., bg-blue-500/10 text-blue-400 for 'New', bg-green-500/10 text-green-400 for 'Replied').
components_instructions.profile_analysis_form: Use Shadcn Form components (Input, Select, Textarea) inside a flat Card. Keep labels small and uppercase (tracking-wide). Input backgrounds should be darker than the card surface.
components_instructions.generate_message_button: The primary 'AI intelligent' action. Use the primary color (#2563EB). Add an icon (e.g., Lucide Sparkles). Consider a subtle inner glow or 'Tracing Beam' effect.
components_instructions.platform_icons: Use react-icons (FaFacebook, FaTiktok, FaYoutube) colored with their respective brand colors when active.

motion_interactions.hover: Interactive elements must transition cleanly (duration-200). Explicitly define text color on hover.
motion_interactions.page_load: Use Framer Motion to stagger the entrance of dashboard widgets and table rows (y: 10, opacity: 0 -> 1).
motion_interactions.modals: Message generation results should appear in a Shadcn Dialog. Animate the generation typing effect if possible.

technical_requirements_for_main_agent: Install required packages: yarn add framer-motion lucide-react react-icons recharts clsx tailwind-merge
Use ONLY pure HTML + Tailwind for structural layouts, and Shadcn UI heavily customized for interactive components (Table, Dialog, Form, Select, DropdownMenu).
CRITICAL: Include `data-testid` on ALL interactive elements (buttons, inputs, dropdowns, table rows) using kebab-case role-based names.
Ensure color contrast meets APCA/WCAG standards. Text on dark background must be #F8FAFC or #A1A1AA.
Do NOT use HTML <select> or <input type='date'>. Use Shadcn DropdownMenu/Select and Calendar.
Avoid generic 'Inter' for headings. Configure 'Outfit' in Tailwind as the sans family for headings, and 'IBM Plex Sans' for body.
